title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO KWOK HING CARLOS YEUNG

chunks.text:
[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11149, November 09, 2018 ]

AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO KWOK HING CARLOS YEUNG

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Mr. Kwok Hing Carlos Yeung is hereby granted Philippine citizenship with all rights, privileges and prerogatives, and is likewise vested with the duties and obligations appurtenant thereto.

SEC. 2. Mr. Kwok Hing Carlos Yeung shall take the Oath of Allegiance to the Republic of the Philippines before an officer duly authorized to administer the same. The Oath of Allegiance shall be registered with the Bureau of Immigration.

SEC. 3. Upon registration of the Oath of Allegiance, the Bureau of Immigration shall issue a Certificate of Naturalization to Mr. Yeung who shall thereupon enter into the full enjoyment of Philippine citizenship.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in any newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 15, 2018 and October 1, 2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 09 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
